title: Randomizer: Complete Edition
description: Random block drops, mob drops, crafting recipes, chest loot, fishing and many more.
body:
This is a version of my [Randomizer](https://modrinth.com/datapack/loot-randomizer) which randomizes much more than only block drops.

Quilt: You need [QSL](https://modrinth.com/mod/qsl), otherwise it won't work.

When updating the crafting recipes will change.

**Randomized:**
- block drops
- mob drops
- recipes (workbench, oven...)
- chest loot
- fishing
- villager gifts (not trades)
- archaeology
- trial chamber spawner loot

**Credits**
- [MangoJellyPudding](https://modrinth.com/user/MangoJellyPudding): For making the [No Recipe Advancements](https://modrinth.com/datapack/no-recipe-advancements) Datapack (licensed under MIT) which is used to hide the randomized crafting recipes in the knowledge book.
